name: Build PR (Visual Studio)

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ] 

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: windows-latest

    steps:
    # Checkout du repo
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    # Setup MSBuild (Visual Studio)
    - name: Setup MSBuild
      uses: microsoft/setup-msbuild@v2

    # Restore NuGet packages (si utilisé)
    - name: Restore NuGet packages
      run: nuget restore SimulateurFerroviaire.sln

    # Build solution
    - name: Build solution
      run: |
        msbuild SimulateurFerroviaire.sln ^
          /p:Configuration=Release ^
          /p:Platform="x64" ^
          /m
